assertions.assertion: Primary disease family equals pancreatic cancer.
Treatment query must not be satisfied by imaging, screening, registry, or observational studies.
Every displayed fact and match reason links to a dated source resource/section.
No output states or implies final eligibility.
System returns needs-review/insufficient-data rather than a confident ranked list.
Pending KRAS is not normalized as a detected alteration.
May 2026 labs are not presented as current for July 2026 matching without a warning.
